title: The Killing Moon
why_this_song: The Killing Moon by Echo & the Bunnymen (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You give yourself to him"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You give yourself to him"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Up against your will"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Through the thick and thin"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: In starlit nights I saw you
Under blue moon I saw you
Up in your arms, too late to beg you
Or cancel it, though I know it must be

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "give" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Under blue moon I saw you

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "The Killing Moon" was released in 1984. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "The Killing Moon" foi lançada em 1984. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
